notes: At first run only texts - tips and help is showing, everything else is just black screen (just in-game, menu looks ok). The game runs well and rendering works fine with "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%", however framerate is the same (or minimal change) at low and high settings. I got about 35-45 FPS - not much but it is playable. The game worked also with "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%", but I got only about 20 FPS. Exiting the game causes crash, the game freezes or ends with unity error message, but Steam is showing the game as running. You can still stop/kill it in task manager.
title: Plane Mechanic Simulator

notes: No apparent issues. Game launches, runs, and plays perfectly, with no error on exit and good performance (~120fps at 1080p high).
title: Plane Mechanic Simulator

notes: Runs fine out of the box with occasional stuttering.
